meta.title: Tetralongia - Ultimate Consolidated Dictionary
meta.subtitle: שפת הטריזם בכל העולם | A Language Based on the Periodic Table
meta.description: Complete consolidated translation of Tetralongia (Treizism) - a constructed language based on the periodic table of elements - into 30 major world languages including newly added Samoan and Hawaiian - Including base material state definitions (Solid/Liquid/Gas) and intensity modifiers (Mag/NeKMag)
new_additions: NeKMag (A little/Not much) - Negation of intensity
Silicon (Sik), Oxygen (OOik), Sand (SiOOik) - Chemical element words
Glass (sokfalmagik) - Compound word from sand + heat + intensity
Gold (auik) - Precious metal from transition metals, representing rarity and value

core_vocabulary_multilingual_complete.description: Complete vocabulary - 70 items translated into all 30 languages organized by category

translations.th: ดวงอาทิตย์

nouns.why: אדמה בטמפרטורת החדר כמוצק - אין סיומת

Au (Aurum) - Transition metal from Period 6, Group 11 of the Periodic Table. Represents rarity, value, and immutability due to its non-reactive nature and precious status. The suffix '-ik' follows the noun formation pattern from Group 14 (Si, C, Ge, Sn, Pb) for constructed objects and precious substances.

translations.th: ความบ้าคลั่ง

nouns.why: אבן בטמפרטורת החדר כמוצק - אין סיומת
Combination of the main elements in air
ku uses to transfer current between cause and effect
עץ בטמפרטורת החדר כמוצק - אין סיומת
רוח בטמפרטורת החדר כגז - אין סיומת

translations.th: สิ่งมีชีวิต

nouns.why: מים בטמפרטורת החדר כנוזל - אין סיומת
fe = מוצק (על שם ברזל - Fe בטבלת היסודות)
Si (Silicon) + OO (O₂ oxygen) + ik (noun suffix) - Silicon dioxide (SiO₂) is the main component of sand
Si (Silicon from periodic table) + ik (noun suffix Group 14) - Silicon is element 14, Group 14 creates ordered structures
OO (O₂ - oxygen as it naturally occurs as diatomic molecule) + ik (noun suffix) - Represented as double O to show O₂ molecular form

sok (abbreviation of SiOOik - sand/silicon dioxide) + fal (abbreviation of heat) + mag (Very/Much - intensifier from Mg magnesium) = Sand + Much heat = Glass (formed by melting sand at high temperatures)

translations.th: อย่างสมดุล
อย่างเงียบ
อย่างรวดเร็ว

intensifiers_diminishers.why: Magnesium (Mg) - highly reactive and energetic element, represents intensity and abundance

translations.th: นิดหน่อย/น้อย/ไม่มาก

intensifiers_diminishers.why: Negation (NeK) + Magnesium (Mag) = Not much/A little, representing the opposite of intensity and abundance

grammar_rules.description: Tetralongia grammar system based on periodic table groups
grammar_rules.noun_formation: Group 14 of Periodic Table (C, Si, Ge, Sn, Pb) endings - '-ik' suffix
grammar_rules.verb_formation: Group 17 of Periodic Table (F, Cl, Br, I) endings - '-af' or '-of' suffix
grammar_rules.connectors: Transition metals (Co, Ni, Ti, Cu, Zn, Fe, I) - single letter or digraph

periodic_table_mapping.H: Hydrogen - Human origin - 'who' questions and basic structures
periodic_table_mapping.He: Helium - Light and fast - Questions, greetings, interrogatives
periodic_table_mapping.Li: Lithium - Reactive metal - Adjectives and descriptive words
periodic_table_mapping.Na: Sodium - Mobile alkali metal - Adverbs and manner
periodic_table_mapping.C: Carbon - Base of life - Nouns group 1 (basic elements)
periodic_table_mapping.Si: Silicon - Ordered structures - Nouns group 2 (constructed objects)
periodic_table_mapping.F: Fluorine - Highly reactive - Verbs (strong, immediate action)
periodic_table_mapping.Fe: Iron - Bonding and strength - Relative clauses and connections
periodic_table_mapping.Cu: Copper - Conductor of causality - 'Because' / causal connection

usage_notes.note_1: Tetralongia is a systematic constructed language (conlang) designed to reflect chemical properties through linguistic patterns
usage_notes.note_2: Elemental symbols can be combined to form compound words with meanings derived from chemical reactions and element properties
usage_notes.note_3: The language serves both as a creative linguistic experiment and as a mnemonic tool for learning the periodic table
usage_notes.note_4: Each translation maintains the core Tetralongia word root while adapting pronunciation and structure to each language's phonological system
usage_notes.note_5: The grammar system is based on Group periodicity, creating logical associations between word categories and element families
usage_notes.note_6: Samoan and Hawaiian translations add Pacific Island perspectives to this global linguistic experiment
usage_notes.note_7: The complete vocabulary now covers 70 items across 30 major world languages plus sign language considerations

statistics.coverage: Complete consolidated edition with all vocabulary fully translated including Gold (Au) - precious metals category

files_consolidated: tetralongia_extended_8_languages.json - Extended set with 8 additional languages
file_consolidation_metadata.consolidation_notes: All vocabulary from complete_multilingual file merged with master structure. New languages (Samoan and Hawaiian) added with culturally appropriate translations.

credits.translation_methodology: Cultural and linguistic adaptation while preserving Tetralongia phonemes and chemical element associations
credits.special_additions: Samoan and Hawaiian translations expand Pacific Island representation in constructed language experiment
credits.supported_languages: 30 major world languages covering approximately 5.6 billion native speakers across all continents
credits.consolidation_purpose: Create unified reference document combining all previous editions with extended language support
